dashboard.alreadyInLeague: You are already in this league
dashboard.competeDaily: Compete against your friends every day
dashboard.createLeagueDesc: Create a league and invite your friends to compete
dashboard.cameraRequirementDesc: If enabled, players must record video for their daily throws.
dashboard.enterInviteCode: Enter the invite code you received from the league creator
dashboard.enterLeagueName: Enter a name for the league
dashboard.isGuestWarning: You are playing as a guest. Create an account to save your data permanently!
dashboard.leagueCanStartNow: The league can start now or in a few days
dashboard.noLeaguesDesc: Create a league or join an existing one to start competing!

guest.bannerDesc: Your guest account will be deleted after 30 days of inactivity. Create an account to secure everything!
guest.bannerDescUrgent: Your guest account is about to expire! Create an account now to keep your data.
guest.featureExpirationDesc: Your guest account and all data will be deleted after 30 days of inactivity.
guest.featureFullAccessDesc: Play matches, join leagues, add friends – everything works!
guest.featureLocalOnlyDesc: All data is stored locally on this device and cannot be synced to other devices.
guest.featureUpgradeDesc: Create an account to keep all your data permanently – nothing will be lost!
guest.logoutDesc: If you log out, all your data will be permanently deleted.
guest.logoutRecommendation: Save your data by creating an account
guest.logoutRecommendationDesc: Create a free account to keep all your data and play on multiple devices.
guest.logoutWarningDesc: Matches, statistics, friends, and all other data linked to your guest account will be lost forever.
guest.logoutWarningTitle: Warning: All data will be deleted
guest.profileInfo: You are logged in as a guest. Your account and all data will be deleted after 30 days of inactivity.
guest.recommendationDesc: Create a free account to save your data permanently and keep your username forever.
guest.statsLocalOnly: Statistics are only shown for logged-in users. Create an account to track your play history.
guest.welcomeDesc: You now have full access to DartStreak! But there are some important things to know:

landing.createAccountCta: Create an account in seconds and start playing.
landing.footer: © 2025 DartStreak. Compete. Have fun. Be the best.
landing.heroDescription: Join daily leagues with friends. No complication, just play.
landing.howLeaguesStep1Desc: Set up a league in seconds and invite friends with a code.
landing.howLeaguesStep2Desc: Everyone throws 9 darts (3x3) whenever they want during the day.
landing.howLeaguesStep3Desc: Scores are tracked automatically. Who tops the table at the end of the week?
landing.leaguesTeaser: Want to compete daily with friends? See how leagues work ↓
landing.noSignupRequired: No account needed · Start playing now
landing.tagline: The easiest way to play darts online
landing.whyUs1Desc: Record your daily throws with your camera. Simple, secure, and fair.
landing.whyUs2Desc: No complex signups. Just invite friends and start throwing.
landing.whyUs3Desc: Create private leagues, track standings, and see who climbs the leaderboard.

league.alreadyRegisteredToday: You have already registered today's throws
league.cameraRequiredDesc: Players must record their throws with a camera.
league.cameraNotRequiredDesc: Players can submit throws without recording.
league.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone and all data will be removed.
league.fiveMinuteWarning: You have 5 minutes to complete once you start
league.leagueNotStarted: The league has not started yet
league.leaveConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to leave this league? Your score history will remain but you will no longer participate in future rounds.
league.noThrowsYet: No one has thrown yet this round
league.notRegisteredToday: You haven't registered today's throws yet
league.restartConfirmDesc: This will create a new league with the same participants and settings. The current league will remain in history.
league.scanWithCamera: Scan with your phone camera to join directly

match.createMatchDesc: Challenge a friend to a darts match
match.guestWarning: Guests can only play offline matches
match.hurryUp: Hurry up! Time is running out!
match.leaveMatchDesc: Are you sure you want to leave the match? This will count as a forfeit (WO).
match.leaveRoomDesc: If you leave the room, the invitation will be cancelled and the match will not start.
match.noFriendsToChallenge: No friends to challenge. Add friends first!
match.opponentLeftDesc: Your opponent has left the match. The match will be cancelled.
match.remoteCameraDescription: Scan this QR code with your phone to use it as a dartboard camera.
match.stayOnPageWarning: Stay on this page. If you leave or switch tabs, the match will be cancelled.
match.straightOutDesc: Any dart can finish the game
match.tapPlusToUseAccount: Tap the plus icon to use your account
match.throwTimeLimitDesc: Each player has this amount of time to register their throw. If time runs out, the player loses.
match.timeoutForfeit: Time's up! You lost the match.

offline.emptyDesc: Start an offline match or tournament to play without an internet connection!

offlineTournament.eliminated: You were eliminated from the tournament

offlineTournament.tournamentWonDesc: You defeated all the bots and claimed victory!

profile.emailUpdated: Email update initiated. Check your inbox.
profile.timezoneDescription: This determines when a new day starts for your leagues

pwa.iosReminderDesc: Add DartStreak to your home screen for quick access

pwa.step2Ios: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

throwInput.cameraNotRequired: Camera not required for this league
throwInput.didNotComplete: You didn't complete all throws within 5 minutes.

tournament.playersCanJoin: Players can still join until then
